title: Spectral Invariants
abstract: AbstractIn the previous chapter we have identified the gauge group canonically associated to any spectral triple and have derived the generalized gauge fields that carry an action of that gauge group. In this chapter we take the next step and search for gauge invariants of these gauge fields, to wit, the spectral action, the topological spectral action and the fermionic action. We derive (asymptotic) expansions of the spectral action.
